03388   class EMRPOLYBEZIERTO16 : public METARECORD, ::EMRPOLYBEZIER16 {
03389     POINT16* lpoints;
03390   public:
03396     EMRPOLYBEZIERTO16 ( const RECTL* bounds, const POINT16* points, INT n )
03397     {
03398       cpts = n;
03399       apts[0].x = 0;            // Really unused
03400       apts[0].y = 0;
03401 
03402       emr.iType = EMR_POLYBEZIERTO16;
03403       // The (cptl-1) below is to account for aptl, which isn't written out
03404       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRPOLYBEZIERTO16 ) + sizeof( POINT16 ) * (cpts-1);
03405 
03406       lpoints = new POINT16[cpts];
03407 
03408       for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
03409         lpoints[i].x = points[i].x;
03410         lpoints[i].y = points[i].y;
03411       }
03412 
03413       rclBounds = *bounds;
03414     }
03419     EMRPOLYBEZIERTO16 ( DATASTREAM& ds )
03420     {
03421       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> cpts;
03422 
03423       lpoints = new POINT16[cpts];
03424 
03425       POINT16ARRAY points( lpoints, cpts );
03426 
03427       ds >> points;
03428     }
03432     ~EMRPOLYBEZIERTO16 ( )
03433     {
03434       if ( lpoints ) delete[] lpoints;
03435     }
03439     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03440     {
03441       ds << emr << rclBounds << cpts << POINT16ARRAY( lpoints, cpts );
03442       return true;
03443     }
03447     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03453     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
03454     {
03455       // According to the wine windef.h header, POINT and POINTL are equivalent
03456       PolyBezierTo16( dc, lpoints, cpts );
03457     }
03458 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03459 
03462     void edit ( void ) const
03463     {
03464       printf( "*POLYBEZIERTO16*\n" );
03465       printf( "\trclBounds.left    : %ld\n", rclBounds.left );
03466       printf( "\trclBounds.top     : %ld\n", rclBounds.top );
03467       printf( "\trclBounds.right   : %ld\n", rclBounds.right );
03468       printf( "\trclBounds.bottom  : %ld\n", rclBounds.bottom );
03469       printf( "\tcpts              : %ld\n", cpts );
03470       printf( "\tapts->\n" );
03471       for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < cpts; i++ )
03472         printf( "\t\t%d, %d\n", lpoints[i].x, lpoints[i].y );
03473     }
03474 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03475   };
03476 
03478 
03481   class EMRPOLYLINETO : public METARECORD, ::EMRPOLYLINETO {
03482     POINTL* lpoints;
03483   public:
03489     EMRPOLYLINETO ( const RECTL* bounds, const POINT* points, INT n )
03490     {
03491       cptl = n;
03492       aptl[0].x = 0;
03493       aptl[0].y = 0;
03494 
03495       emr.iType = EMR_POLYLINETO;
03496       // The (cptl-1) below is to account for aptl, which isn't written out
03497       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRPOLYLINETO ) + sizeof( POINTL ) * (cptl-1);
03498 
03499       lpoints = new POINTL[cptl];
03500 
03501       for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
03502         lpoints[i].x = points[i].x;
03503         lpoints[i].y = points[i].y;
03504       }
03505 
03506       rclBounds = *bounds;
03507     }
03512     EMRPOLYLINETO ( DATASTREAM& ds )
03513     {
03514       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> cptl;
03515 
03516       lpoints = new POINTL[cptl];
03517 
03518       POINTLARRAY points( lpoints, cptl );
03519 
03520       ds >> points;
03521     }
03525     ~EMRPOLYLINETO ( )
03526     {
03527       if ( lpoints ) delete[] lpoints;
03528     }
03532     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03533     {
03534       ds << emr << rclBounds << cptl << POINTLARRAY( lpoints, cptl );
03535       return true;
03536     }
03540     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03546     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
03547     {
03548       // According to the wine windef.h header, POINT and POINTL are equivalent
03549       PolylineTo( dc, (POINT*)lpoints, cptl );
03550     }
03551 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03552 
03555     void edit ( void ) const
03556     {
03557       printf( "*POLYLINETO*\n" );
03558       printf( "\trclBounds.left    : %ld\n", rclBounds.left );
03559       printf( "\trclBounds.top     : %ld\n", rclBounds.top );
03560       printf( "\trclBounds.right   : %ld\n", rclBounds.right );
03561       printf( "\trclBounds.bottom  : %ld\n", rclBounds.bottom );
03562       printf( "\tcptl              : %ld\n", cptl );
03563       printf( "\taptl->\n" );
03564       for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < cptl; i++ )
03565         printf( "\t\t%ld, %ld\n", lpoints[i].x, lpoints[i].y );
03566     }
03567 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03568   };
03569 
03571 
03574   class EMRPOLYLINETO16 : public METARECORD, ::EMRPOLYLINETO16 {
03575     POINT16* lpoints;
03576   public:
03582     EMRPOLYLINETO16 ( const RECTL* bounds, const POINT16* points, INT n )
03583     {
03584       cpts = n;
03585       apts[0].x = 0;
03586       apts[0].y = 0;
03587 
03588       emr.iType = EMR_POLYLINETO16;
03589       // The (cptl-1) below is to account for aptl, which isn't written out
03590       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRPOLYLINETO16 ) + sizeof( POINT16 ) * (cpts-1);
03591 
03592       lpoints = new POINT16[cpts];
03593 
03594       for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
03595         lpoints[i].x = points[i].x;
03596         lpoints[i].y = points[i].y;
03597       }
03598 
03599       rclBounds = *bounds;
03600     }
03605     EMRPOLYLINETO16 ( DATASTREAM& ds )
03606     {
03607       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> cpts;
03608 
03609       lpoints = new POINT16[cpts];
03610 
03611       POINT16ARRAY points( lpoints, cpts );
03612 
03613       ds >> points;
03614     }
03618     ~EMRPOLYLINETO16 ( )
03619     {
03620       if ( lpoints ) delete[] lpoints;
03621     }
03625     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03626     {
03627       ds << emr << rclBounds << cpts << POINT16ARRAY( lpoints, cpts );
03628       return true;
03629     }
03633     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03639     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
03640     {
03641       // According to the wine windef.h header, POINT and POINTL are equivalent
03642       PolylineTo16( dc, lpoints, cpts );
03643     }
03644 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03645 
03648     void edit ( void ) const
03649     {
03650       printf( "*POLYLINETO16*\n" );
03651       printf( "\trclBounds.left    : %ld\n", rclBounds.left );
03652       printf( "\trclBounds.top     : %ld\n", rclBounds.top );
03653       printf( "\trclBounds.right   : %ld\n", rclBounds.right );
03654       printf( "\trclBounds.bottom  : %ld\n", rclBounds.bottom );
03655       printf( "\tcpts              : %ld\n", cpts );
03656       printf( "\tapts->\n" );
03657       for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < cpts; i++ )
03658         printf( "\t\t%d, %d\n", lpoints[i].x, lpoints[i].y );
03659     }
03660 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03661   };
03662 
03664 
03669   class EMREXTTEXTOUTA : public METARECORD, ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA {
03670     PSTR string_a;
03671     int string_size;
03672 
03673     INT* dx_i;
03674   public:
03684     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( const RECTL* bounds, DWORD graphicsMode, FLOAT xScale,
03685                      FLOAT yScale, const PEMRTEXT text, LPCSTR string,
03686                      const INT* dx )
03687     {
03688       emr.iType = EMR_EXTTEXTOUTA;
03689       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA );
03690 
03691       rclBounds = *bounds;
03692 
03693       iGraphicsMode = graphicsMode;
03694       exScale = xScale;
03695       eyScale = yScale;
03696 
03697       emrtext = *text;
03698 
03699       string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
03700 
03701       string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
03702 
03703       memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
03704 
03705       for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
03706         string_a[i] = *string++;
03707 
03708       emrtext.offString = emr.nSize;
03709       emr.nSize += string_size * sizeof(CHAR);
03710 
03711       if ( dx ) {
03712 
03713         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
03714 
03715         for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
03716           dx_i[i] = *dx++;
03717 
03718         emrtext.offDx = emr.nSize;
03719         emr.nSize += emrtext.nChars * sizeof(INT);
03720       }
03721       else {
03722         emrtext.offDx = 0;
03723         dx_i = 0;
03724       }
03725     }
03730     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( DATASTREAM& ds )
03731     {
03732       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> iGraphicsMode >> exScale >> eyScale >> emrtext;
03733 
03734       if ( emrtext.offString != 0 ) {
03735         string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
03736 
03737         string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
03738 
03739         memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
03740 
03741         CHARSTR string( string_a, string_size );
03742 
03743         ds >> string;
03744       }
03745       else
03746         string_a = 0;
03747 
03748       if ( emrtext.offDx ) {
03749         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
03750 
03751         INTARRAY dx_is( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
03752 
03753         ds >> dx_is;
03754       }
03755       else
03756         dx_i = 0;
03757     }
03762     ~EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( )
03763     {
03764       if ( string_a ) delete[] string_a;
03765       if ( dx_i ) delete[] dx_i;
03766     }
03770     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03771     {
03772       ds << emr << rclBounds << iGraphicsMode << exScale << eyScale
03773          << emrtext << CHARSTR( string_a, string_size );
03774       if ( dx_i )
03775         ds << INTARRAY( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
03776       return true;
03777     }
03781     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03787     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
03788     {
03789       RECT rect;
03790       rect.left = emrtext.rcl.left;
03791       rect.top = emrtext.rcl.top;
03792       rect.right = emrtext.rcl.right;
03793       rect.bottom = emrtext.rcl.bottom;
03794 
03795       ExtTextOutA( dc, emrtext.ptlReference.x, emrtext.ptlReference.y,
03796                    emrtext.fOptions, &rect, string_a, emrtext.nChars,
03797                    dx_i );
03798     }
03799 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03800 
03803     void edit ( void ) const
03804     {
03805       printf( "*EXTTEXTOUTA*\n" );
03806       printf( "\trclBounds: (%ld,%ld)-(%ld,%ld)\n", rclBounds.left, rclBounds.top,
03807               rclBounds.right, rclBounds.bottom );
03808       printf( "\tiGraphicsMode:" );
03809       switch ( iGraphicsMode ) {
03810       case GM_COMPATIBLE: printf( "GM_COMPATIBLE\n" ); break;
03811       case GM_ADVANCED: printf( "GM_ADVANCED\n" ); break;
03812       default: printf( "unknown(%ld)\n", iGraphicsMode );
03813       }
03814       printf( "\texScale: %f\n", exScale );
03815       printf( "\teyScale: %f\n", eyScale );
03816       printf( "\tptlReference: (%ld,%ld)\n", emrtext.ptlReference.x,
03817               emrtext.ptlReference.y );
03818       printf( "\tnChars: %ld\n", emrtext.nChars );
03819       printf( "\toffString: %ld\n", emrtext.offString );
03820       printf( "\tfOptions: " );
03821       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GRAYED )
03822         printf( "ETO_GRAYED | " );
03823       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_OPAQUE )
03824         printf( "ETO_OPAQUE | " );
03825       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_CLIPPED )
03826         printf( "ETO_CLIPPED | " );
03827       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GLYPH_INDEX )
03828         printf( "ETO_GLYPH_INDEX | " );
03829       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_RTLREADING )
03830         printf( "ETO_RTLREADING | " );
03831       if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE )
03832         printf( "ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE" );
03833       printf( "\n" );
03834       printf( "\trcl: (%ld,%ld)-(%ld,%ld)\n", emrtext.rcl.left, emrtext.rcl.top,
03835               emrtext.rcl.right, emrtext.rcl.bottom );
03836       printf( "\toffDx: %ld\n", emrtext.offDx );
03837 
03838       printf( "\tString:\n\t\t%s\n",  string_a );
03839 
03840       if ( emrtext.offDx != 0 ) {
03841         printf( "\tOffsets:\n\t\t" );
03842         for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < emrtext.nChars; i++ )
03843           printf( "%d ", dx_i[i] );
03844         printf( "\n" );
03845       }
03846     }
03847 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03848   };
03849 
03851 
03854   class EMRSETPIXELV : public METARECORD, ::EMRSETPIXELV {
03855   public:
03861     EMRSETPIXELV ( INT x, INT y, COLORREF color )
03862     {
03863       emr.iType = EMR_SETPIXELV;
03864       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSETPIXELV );
03865       ptlPixel.x = x;
03866       ptlPixel.y = y;
03867       crColor = color;
03868     }
03873     EMRSETPIXELV ( DATASTREAM& ds )
03874     {
03875       ds >> emr >> ptlPixel >> crColor;
03876     }
03880     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03881     {
03882       ds << emr << ptlPixel << crColor;
03883       return true;
03884     }
03888     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03894     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
03895     {
03896       SetPixel( dc, ptlPixel.x, ptlPixel.y, crColor );
03897     }
03898 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03899 
03902     void edit ( void ) const
03903     {
03904       printf( "*SETPIXELV*\n" );
03905       printf( "\tptlPixel: %ld, %ld\n", ptlPixel.x, ptlPixel.y );
03906       printf( "\tcrColor: 0x%lx\n", crColor );
03907     }
03908 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03909   };
03910 
03911   class PEN;
03912   class EXTPEN;
03913   class BRUSH;
03914   class FONT;
03915   class PALETTE;
03916 
03918 
03921   class EMRCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPEN
03922   {
03923   public:
03928     EMRCREATEPEN ( PEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
03933     EMRCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
03937     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
03938     {
03939       ds << emr << ihPen << lopn;
03940       return true;
03941     }
03945     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
03951     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
03952 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
03953 
03956     void edit ( void ) const
03957     {
03958       printf( "*CREATEPEN*\n" );
03959       printf( "\tihPen: 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
03960 #if 0
03961       printf( "\tlopn.lopnStyle : " );
03962       switch ( lopn.lopnStyle & PS_STYLE_MASK ) {
03963       case PS_SOLID: printf( "PS_SOLID" ); break;
03964       case PS_DASH: printf( "PS_DASH" ); break;
03965       case PS_DOT: printf( "PS_DOT" ); break;
03966       case PS_DASHDOT: printf( "PS_DASHDOT" ); break;
03967       case PS_DASHDOTDOT: printf( "PS_DASHDOTDOT" ); break;
03968       case PS_NULL: printf( "PS_NULL" ); break;
03969       case PS_INSIDEFRAME: printf( "PS_INSIDEFRAME" ); break;
03970       case PS_USERSTYLE: printf( "PS_USERSTYLE" ); break;
03971       case PS_ALTERNATE: printf( "PS_ALTERNATE" ); break;
03972       }
03973 #else
03974       edit_pen_style( "lopn.lopnStyle", lopn.lopnStyle );
03975 #endif
03976       printf( "\tlopn.lopnWidth : %ld, %ld\n", lopn.lopnWidth.x, lopn.lopnWidth.y );
03977       printf( "\tlopn.lopnColor : 0x%lx\n", lopn.lopnColor );
03978     }
03979 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
03980   };
03981 
03983 
03987   class EMREXTCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEPEN
03988   {
03989   public:
03994     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( EXTPEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
03999     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04003     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04004     {
04005       ds << emr << ihPen << offBmi << cbBmi << offBits << cbBits << elp;
04006       return true;
04007     }
04011     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04017     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04018 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04019 
04022     void edit ( void ) const
04023     {
04024       printf( "*EXTCREATEPEN*\n" );
04025       printf( "\tihPen   : 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
04026       printf( "\toffBmi  : %ld\n",  offBmi );
04027       printf( "\tcbBmi   : %ld\n", cbBmi );
04028       printf( "\toffBits : %ld\n", offBits );
04029       printf( "\tcbBits  : %ld\n", cbBits );
04030       edit_pen_style( "elp.elpPenStyle", elp.elpPenStyle );
04031       printf( "\telp.elpWidth : %ld\n", elp.elpWidth );
04032       edit_brush_style( "elp.elpBrushStyle", elp.elpBrushStyle );
04033       printf( "\telp.elpColor : 0x%lx\n", elp.elpColor );
04034       edit_brush_hatch( "elp.elpHatch", elp.elpHatch );
04035       printf( "\telp.elpNumEntries : %ld\n", elp.elpNumEntries );
04036     }
04037 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04038   };
04039 
04041 
04044   class EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT
04045   {
04046   public:
04051     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( BRUSH* brush, HGDIOBJ handle );
04056     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04060     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04061     {
04062       ds << emr << ihBrush << lb;
04063       return true;
04064     }
04068     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04074     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04075 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04076 
04079     void edit ( void ) const
04080     {
04081       printf( "*CREATEBRUSHINDIRECT*\n" );
04082       printf( "\tihBrush: 0x%lx\n", ihBrush );
04083       edit_brush_style( "lb.lbStyle", lb.lbStyle );
04084       printf( "\tlb.lbColor : 0x%lx\n", lb.lbColor );
04085       edit_brush_hatch( "lb.lbHatch", lb.lbHatch );
04086     }
04087 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04088   };
04089 
04091 
04094   class EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW
04095   {
04096   public:
04101     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( FONT* font, HGDIOBJ handle );
04106     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04110     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04111     {
04112       // Since EMF records have to be multiples of 4 bytes, this
04113       // should perhaps be a general thing, but we know it's currently
04114       // only a problem for this structure.
04115 
04116       ds << emr << ihFont << elfw << PADDING( 2 );
04117 
04118       return true;
04119     }
04123     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04129     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04130 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04131 
04134     void edit ( void ) const
04135     {
04136       printf( "*EXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW*\n" );
04137       printf( "\tihFont: %ld\n", ihFont );
04138       printf( "\tlfHeight: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfHeight );
04139       printf( "\tlfWidth: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfWidth );
04140       printf( "\tlfEscapement: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfEscapement );
04141       printf( "\tlfOrientation: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOrientation );
04142       printf( "\tlfWeight: " );
04143       switch ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfWeight ) {
04144       case FW_DONTCARE: printf( "FW_DONTCARE\n" ); break;
04145       case FW_THIN: printf( "FW_THIN\n" ); break;
04146       case FW_EXTRALIGHT: printf( "FW_EXTRALIGHT\n" ); break;
04147       case FW_LIGHT: printf( "FW_LIGHT\n" ); break;
04148       case FW_NORMAL: printf( "FW_NORMAL\n" ); break;
04149       case FW_MEDIUM: printf( "FW_MEDIUM\n" ); break;
04150       case FW_SEMIBOLD: printf( "FW_SEMIBOLD\n" ); break;
04151       case FW_BOLD: printf( "FW_BOLD\n" ); break;
04152       case FW_EXTRABOLD: printf( "FW_EXTRABOLD\n" ); break;
04153       case FW_BLACK: printf( "FW_BLACK\n" ); break;
04154       }
04155       printf( "\tlfItalic: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfItalic );
04156       printf( "\tlfUnderline: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfUnderline );
04157       printf( "\tlfStrikeOut: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfStrikeOut );
04158       printf( "\tlfCharSet: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfCharSet );
04159       printf( "\tlfOutPrecision: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOutPrecision );
04160       printf( "\tlfClipPrecision: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfClipPrecision );
04161       printf( "\tlfQuality: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfQuality );
04162       printf( "\tlfPitchAndFamily: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfPitchAndFamily );
04163       int i = 0;
04164       printf( "\tlfFaceName: '" );
04165       while ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04166         putchar( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] );
04167         i++;
04168       }
04169       puts( "'" );
04170 
04171       i = 0;
04172       printf( "\telfFullName: '" );
04173       while ( elfw.elfFullName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FULLFACESIZE ) {
04174         putchar( elfw.elfFullName[i] );
04175         i++;
04176       }
04177       puts( "'" );
04178 
04179       i = 0;
04180       printf( "\telfStyle: '" );
04181       while ( elfw.elfStyle[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04182         putchar( elfw.elfStyle[i] );
04183         i++;
04184       }
04185       puts( "'" );
04186 
04187       printf( "\telfVersion: %ld\n", elfw.elfVersion );
04188       printf( "\telfStyleSize: %ld\n", elfw.elfStyleSize );
04189       printf( "\telfMatch: %ld\n", elfw.elfMatch );
04190       printf( "\telfVendorId: '%s'\n", elfw.elfVendorId );
04191       printf( "\telfCulture: %ld\n", elfw.elfCulture );
04192       printf( "\telfPanose:\n" );
04193       printf( "\t\tbFamilyType: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bFamilyType );
04194       printf( "\t\tbSerifStyle: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bSerifStyle );
04195       printf( "\t\tbWeight: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bWeight );
04196       printf( "\t\tbProportion: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bProportion );
04197       printf( "\t\tbContrast: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bContrast );
04198       printf( "\t\tbStrokeVariation: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bStrokeVariation );
04199       printf( "\t\tbArmStyle: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bArmStyle );
04200       printf( "\t\tbLetterform: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bLetterform );
04201       printf( "\t\tbMidline: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bMidline );
04202       printf( "\t\tbXHeight: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bXHeight );
04203     }
04204 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04205   };
04206 
04208 
04211   class EMRCREATEPALETTE : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPALETTE
04212   {
04213   public:
04218     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( PALETTE* palette, HGDIOBJ handle );
04223     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04227     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04228     {
04229       ds << emr << ihPal << lgpl;
04230       return true;
04231     }
04235     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04241     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04242 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04243 
04246     void edit ( void ) const
04247     {
04248       printf( "*CREATEPALETTE* (not really handled by libEMF)\n" );
04249     }
04250 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04251   };

04257   class EMRFILLPATH : public METARECORD, ::EMRFILLPATH {
04258   public:
04263     EMRFILLPATH ( const RECTL* bounds )
04264     {
04265       emr.iType = EMR_FILLPATH;
04266       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRFILLPATH );
04267       rclBounds = *bounds;
04268     }
04273     EMRFILLPATH ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04274     {
04275       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
04276     }
04280     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04281     {
04282       ds << emr << rclBounds;
04283       return true;
04284     }
04288     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04294     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const
04295     {
04296       FillPath( dc );
04297     }
04298 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04299 
04302     void edit ( void ) const
04303     {
04304       printf( "*FILLPATH*\n" );
04305       printf( "\trclBounds.left    : %ld\n", rclBounds.left );
04306       printf( "\trclBounds.top     : %ld\n", rclBounds.top );
04307       printf( "\trclBounds.right   : %ld\n", rclBounds.right );
04308       printf( "\trclBounds.bottom  : %ld\n", rclBounds.bottom );
04309     }
04310 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04311   };

04540       lopnWidth = lpen->lopnWidth;

04554     {

04632   class FONT : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public EXTLOGFONTW {
04633   public:
04637     FONT ( const LOGFONTW* lfont )
04638     {
04639       this->elfLogFont = *lfont;
04640       // There are a lot more entries in the EXTLOGFONTW structure than
04641       // the API has values for, so we invent them here
04642       memset( &elfFullName, 0, sizeof elfFullName );
04643       memset( &elfStyle, 0, sizeof elfStyle );
04644       elfVersion = ELF_VERSION;
04645       elfStyleSize = 0;
04646       elfMatch = 0;
04647       elfReserved = 0;
04648       memset( &elfVendorId, 0, sizeof elfVendorId );
04649       elfCulture = ELF_CULTURE_LATIN;
04650       memset( &elfPanose, 1, sizeof(PANOSE) );
04651     }
04655     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_FONT; }
04662     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
04663     {
04664       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
04665       return new EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW( this, emf_handle );
04666     }
04667   };
04668 
04670 
04673   class PALETTE : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGPALETTE {
04674   public:
04678     PALETTE ( const LOGPALETTE* lpalette )
04679     {
04680       (void)lpalette;
04681       palVersion = 0;
04682       palNumEntries = 0;
04683       PALETTEENTRY zero_entry = { 0, 0, 0, 0 };
04684       palPalEntry[0] = zero_entry;
04685     }
04689     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PALETTE; }
04696     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
04697     {
04698       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
04699       return new EMRCREATEPALETTE( this, emf_handle );
04700     }
04701   };
04702 
04704 
04710   class METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT : public OBJECT {
04718     void init ( const RECT* size, LPCWSTR description_w ) {
04719 
04720       // Evidently, metafile handles are numbered from 1, so don't
04721       // ever use 0.
04722 
04723       handles.push_back( true );
04724 
04725       // Keep some of our graphics state in a header record
04726 
04727       header = new ENHMETAHEADER ( description_w );
04728       records.push_back( header );
04729 
04730       // Compute the size and position of the metafile on the "page"
04731 
04732       if ( size ) {
04733         update_frame = false;
04734 
04735         header->rclFrame.left = size->left;
04736         header->rclFrame.top = size->top;
04737         header->rclFrame.right = size->right;
04738         header->rclFrame.bottom = size->bottom;
04739 
04740         header->rclBounds.left =
04741           size->left * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
04742         header->rclBounds.top =
04743           size->top * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
04744         header->rclBounds.right =
04745           size->right * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
04746         header->rclBounds.bottom =
04747           size->bottom * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
04748       }
04749       else {
04750         update_frame = true;
04751 
04752         header->rclBounds.left = -10;
04753         header->rclBounds.top = -10;
04754         header->rclBounds.right = 10;
04755         header->rclBounds.bottom = 10;
04756 
04757         header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
04758           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
04759         header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
04760           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
04761         header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
04762           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
04763         header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
04764           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
04765       }
04766 
04767       // Some default graphics state (are they really, though?)
04768 
04769       SIZEL default_resolution = { RESOLUTION, RESOLUTION };
04770       resolution = default_resolution;
04771       SIZEL default_viewport_ext = { 1, 1 };
04772       viewport_ext = default_viewport_ext;
04773       POINT default_viewport_org = { 0, 0 };
04774       viewport_org = default_viewport_org;
04775       SIZEL default_window_ext = { 1, 1 };
04776       window_ext = default_window_ext;
04777       POINT default_window_org = { 0, 0 };
04778       window_org = default_window_org;
04779 
04780       min_device_point = viewport_org;
04781       max_device_point = viewport_org;
04782 
04783       pen = (PEN*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_PEN | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
04784       brush = (BRUSH*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_BRUSH | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
04785       font = (FONT*)globalObjects.find( DEVICE_DEFAULT_FONT | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
04786       palette = (PALETTE*)globalObjects.find( DEFAULT_PALETTE|ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
04787 
04788       text_alignment = TA_BASELINE;
04789       text_color = RGB(0,0,0);
04790       bk_color = RGB(0xff,0xff,0xff);
04791       bk_mode = OPAQUE;
04792       polyfill_mode = ALTERNATE;
04793       map_mode = MM_TEXT;
04794 
04795       handle = globalObjects.add( this );
04796     }
04797 
04798   public:
04802     ::FILE* fp;
04807     DATASTREAM ds;
04811     ENHMETAHEADER* header;
04815     std::vector< EMF::METARECORD* > records;
04816 
04817     // Keep a small set of graphics state information
04818     SIZEL resolution;           
04819     SIZEL viewport_ext;         
04820     POINT viewport_org;         
04821     SIZEL window_ext;           
04822     POINT window_org;           
04823     bool update_frame;          
04824     POINT min_device_point;     
04825     POINT max_device_point;     
04826     POINT point;                
04827     PEN* pen;                   
04828     BRUSH* brush;               
04829     FONT* font;                 
04830     PALETTE* palette;           
04831     UINT text_alignment;        
04832     COLORREF text_color;        
04833     COLORREF bk_color;          
04834     INT bk_mode;                
04835     INT polyfill_mode;          
04836     INT map_mode;               
04837 
04843     std::vector< bool > handles;
04844 
04850     std::map< HGDIOBJ, HGDIOBJ > emf_handles;
04851 
04862       METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( FILE* fp_, const RECT* size,
04863                               LPCWSTR description_w )
04864         : fp(fp_), ds( fp_ )
04865     {
04866           init( size, description_w );
04867     }
04872     virtual ~METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( )
04873     {
04874       // Purge all the metarecords (if there are any) {this include the
04875       // header record, too}
04876       if ( records.size() > 0 )
04877         deleteMetafile();
04878     }
04882     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT; }
04887     DWORD nextHandle ( void )
04888     {
04889       for ( unsigned int i = 1; i < handles.size(); i++ ) {
04890         if ( !handles[i] ) {
04891           handles[i] = true;
04892           return i;
04893         }
04894       }
04895       handles.push_back( true );
04896       // So, the number of handles is equal to largest ever handle value
04897       header->nHandles = handles.size()-1;
04898       return header->nHandles;
04899     }
04903     void clearHandle ( DWORD handle )
04904     {
04905       handles[handle] = false;
04906     }
04912     void appendRecord ( METARECORD* record )
04913     {
04914       records.push_back( record );
04915 
04916       header->nBytes += record->size();
04917       header->nRecords++;
04918     }
04924     void appendHandle ( METARECORD* record )
04925     {
04926       records.push_back( record );
04927 
04928       header->nBytes += record->size();
04929       header->nRecords++;
04930     }
04935     void deleteMetafile ( void )
04936     {
04937       for ( std::vector<METARECORD*>::const_iterator r = records.begin();
04938             r != records.end();
04939             r++ ) {
04940         delete *r;
04941       }
04942       records.clear();
04943     }
04948     void mergePoint ( const LONG& x, const LONG& y )
04949     {
04950       POINT p;
04951       p.x = x;
04952       p.y = y;
04953       mergePoint( p );
04954     }
04959     void mergePoint( const POINT& p )
04960     {
04961       POINT device_point;
04962 
04963       // *** Note, it's possible for the global transformation matrix to
04964       // affect this too. ***
04965 
04966       device_point.x = (LONG)( (float)( p.x - window_org.x ) / window_ext.cx *
04967         viewport_ext.cx + viewport_org.x );
04968 
04969       device_point.y = (LONG)( (float)( p.y - window_org.y ) / window_ext.cy *
04970         viewport_ext.cy + viewport_org.y );
04971 
04972       // If the user didn't specify a bounding rectangle in the constructor,
04973       // compute one from this data, too.
04974       if ( device_point.x < min_device_point.x ) {
04975         min_device_point.x = device_point.x;
04976         if ( update_frame ) {
04977           header->rclBounds.left = min_device_point.x - 10;
04978           header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
04979             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
04980         }
04981       }
04982       else if ( device_point.x > max_device_point.x ) {
04983         max_device_point.x = device_point.x;
04984         if ( update_frame ) {
04985           header->rclBounds.right = max_device_point.x + 10;
04986           header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
04987             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
04988         }
04989       }
04990 
04991       if ( device_point.y < min_device_point.y ) {
04992         min_device_point.y = device_point.y;
04993         if ( update_frame ) {
04994           header->rclBounds.top = min_device_point.y - 10;
04995           header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
04996             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
04997         }
04998       }
04999       else if ( device_point.y > max_device_point.y ) {
05000         max_device_point.y = device_point.y;
05001         if ( update_frame ) {
05002           header->rclBounds.bottom = max_device_point.y + 10;
05003           header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05004             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05005         }
05006       }
05007     }
05008   };
05009 
05010 } // close EMF namespace
05011 
05012 #endif /* _LIBEMF_H */
Generated at Mon Jan 7 14:35:12 2002 for EMF by 1.2.8.1 written by Dimitri van Heesch, © 1997-2001
